title: tic data / foreign holdings / capital flows | Data Release Other | Preliminary Report on Foreign Holdings of U.S. Securities at...
summary: The Treasury released preliminary data from its annual survey of foreign portfolio holdings of U.S. securities as of June 30, 2025, showing total foreign holdings of $35,334 billion, up 14.4% from $30,881 billion in June 2024. The survey was conducted jointly by Treasury, the Federal Reserve Bank of New York, and the Federal Reserve Board, with final results expected on April 30, 2026.
